'''旧暦5月3日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[弘仁]]10年（[[819年]]_月_日） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]元年（[[1592年]]_月_日） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル]]）に入城 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]12年（[[1829年]]_月_日） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建保]]元年（[[1213年]]_月_日） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月2日 (旧暦)|5月2日]] 翌日[[5月4日 (旧暦)|5月4日]] - 前月[[4月3日 (旧暦)|4月3日]] 翌月[[6月3日 (旧暦)|6月3日]] *新暦[[5月3日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: =誕生日= 大村益次郎移動
revision.text:

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月3日'''（きゅうれきごがつみっか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[弘仁]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[819年]][[5月30日]]） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1592年]][[6月12日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]]）に入城 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[6月22日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1824年]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869年]]） * 文政12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建保]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月24日]]） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月3日'''（きゅうれきごがつみっか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[弘仁]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[819年]][[5月30日]]） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1592年]][[6月12日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]]）に入城 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[6月22日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1824年]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869年]]） * 文政12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建保]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月24日]]） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147年]]）

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月3日'''（きゅうれきごがつみっか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[弘仁]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[819年]][[5月30日]]） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1592年]][[6月12日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]]）に入城 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[6月22日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1824年]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869年]]） * 文政12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建保]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月24日]]） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147年]]）

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 3'''<!--Lunar May3-->きゅうれきごがつみっか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== Events == * [[弘仁]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[819年]][[5月30日]]） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1592年]][[6月12日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]]）に入城 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[6月22日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== Births == * [[文政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1824年]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869年]]） * 文政12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903年]]）
== Deaths == * [[建保]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月24日]]） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

== Births == * [[文政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1824年]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869年]]） * 文政12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903年]]）

[[sn:May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[弘仁]]10年（[[Julian Calendar]][[819]][[5月30日]]） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1592]][[6月12日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]]）に入城 * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[6月22日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== Births == * [[文政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1824]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869]]） * 文政12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903]]）
== Deaths == * [[建保]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1213]][[5月24日]]） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147]]）

[[sn:May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[弘仁]]10th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[819]][[5月30日]]） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1592]][[6月12日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]]）に入城 * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[6月22日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== Births == * [[文政]]7th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1824]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869]]） * 文政12nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1829]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903]]）
== Deaths == * [[建保]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1213]][[5月24日]]） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147]]）

== Events == * [[弘仁]]10th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[819]][[5月30日]]） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1592]][[6月12日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]]）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[6月22日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== Births == * [[文政]]7th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1824]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869]]） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1829]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903]]）
== Deaths == * [[建保]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1213]][[5月24日]]） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

[[sn:May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[5月30日]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[6月12日]] ） - [[豊臣秀吉]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]] ・[[加藤清正]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[6月22日]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[6月4日]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[横綱]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[建保]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[5月24日]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）

[[sn:May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[豊臣秀吉]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]] ・[[加藤清正]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[横綱]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[建保]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[豊臣秀吉]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]] ・[[加藤清正]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[横綱]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[建保]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[豊臣秀吉]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]] ・[[加藤清正]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[横綱]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[建保]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] 初代侍所別当（* [[qq47]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[豊臣秀吉]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]] ・[[加藤清正]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[横綱]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[建保]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、[[武将]] ・[[鎌倉幕府]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages to be translated]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[豊臣秀吉]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]] ・[[加藤清正]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[建保]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[鎌倉幕府]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[Konishi Yukinaga]] ・[[Katō Kiyomasa]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[鎌倉幕府]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[Konishi Yukinaga]] ・[[Katō Kiyomasa]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Kamakura shogunate]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[Konishi Yukinaga]] ・[[Katō Kiyomasa]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Kamakura shogunate]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[Konishi Yukinaga]] ・[[Katō Kiyomasa]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Kamakura shogunate]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[Konishi Yukinaga]] ・[[Katō Kiyomasa]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Kamakura shogunate]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[Konishi Yukinaga]] ・[[Katō Kiyomasa]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1903]] ）

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Deprecated s front]] I guess tryiing to remove both at once like that just brought this one back? using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[819]] [[May 30]] ） - [[空海]] が[[高野山]] で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]] の開創に着手 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku|12=draft}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[June 12]] ） - [[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[Konishi Yukinaga]] ・[[Katō Kiyomasa]] が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]] ）に入城 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[June 22]] ） - [[戊辰戦争]] で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]] が成立
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1824]] 5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]] 、兵学者（+ [[1869]] ） * 文政12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1829]] [[June 4]] ） - [[陣幕久五郎]] 、12代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1903]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1213]] [[May 24]] ） - [[和田義盛]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} ・[[Kamakura shogunate]] 初代侍所別当（* [[1147]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]]
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[819]] {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日}}) – {{ill|Kūkai|ja|空海}} began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at {{ill|Kōyasan|ja|高野山}}, founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, {{ill|Kongōbu-ji|ja|金剛峯寺}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1592]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日}}) – In the first Korean expedition led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}}, the vanguard forces including {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|小西行長}} and {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|ja|加藤清正}} entered Hanseong (present-day [[Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日}}) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1340]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Mototada|ja|足利基氏}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[1367]]). * [[永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1511]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|ja|足利義晴}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[1550]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1869]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日}}) – {{ill|Kawakami Bēzan|ja|川上眉山}}, a novelist (died [[1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1213]] {{ill|May 24|ja|5月24日}}) – {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛}}, a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1147]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[667]] {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日}}) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇}}) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1644]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) – Rebel leader {{ill|Li Zicheng|ja|李自成}} led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor {{ill|Chongzhen|ja|崇禎帝}} committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1870]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1838]] {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日}}) – {{ill|Gotō Shōjirō|ja|後藤象二郎}}, a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[Huangchu]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[223]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日}}) – {{ill|Cao Ren|ja|曹仁}}, a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[168]]). * [[Chiku]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[245]] {{ill|May 2|ja|5月2日}}) – {{ill|Lu Xun|ja|陸遜}}, a military commander and statesman (born [[183]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[819]] {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kūkai|ja|空海|12=draft}} began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at {{ill|Kōyasan|ja|高野山|12=draft}}, founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, {{ill|Kongōbu-ji|ja|金剛峯寺|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1592]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft}}) – In the first Korean expedition led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}, the vanguard forces including {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|小西行長|12=draft}} and {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|ja|加藤清正|12=draft}} entered Hanseong (present-day [[Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=draft}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1340]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Mototada|ja|足利基氏|12=draft}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏|12=draft}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[1367]]). * [[永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1511]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|ja|足利義晴|12=draft}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[1550]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1869]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kawakami Bēzan|ja|川上眉山|12=draft}}, a novelist (died [[1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1213]] {{ill|May 24|ja|5月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛|12=draft}}, a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1147]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:deprecated open]] [[Category:deprecated close]] [[Category:q]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Days 3 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 3일]] [[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月初三]] [[en:draft:May 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:5月3日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:May 3日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ay 3 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初三]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[819]] {{ill|May 30|ja|5月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kūkai|ja|空海|12=draft}} began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at {{ill|Kōyasan|ja|高野山|12=draft}}, founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, {{ill|Kongōbu-ji|ja|金剛峯寺|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1592]] {{ill|June 12|ja|6月12日|12=draft}}) – In the first Korean expedition led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}, the vanguard forces including {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|ja|小西行長|12=draft}} and {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|ja|加藤清正|12=draft}} entered Hanseong (present-day [[Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=draft}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1340]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Mototada|ja|足利基氏|12=draft}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏|12=draft}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[1367]]). * [[永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1511]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|ja|足利義晴|12=draft}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[1550]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1869]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kawakami Bēzan|ja|川上眉山|12=draft}}, a novelist (died [[1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1213]] {{ill|May 24|ja|5月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|ja|和田義盛|12=draft}}, a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1147]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月3日'''（きゅうれきごがつみっか）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[弘仁]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[819年]][[5月30日]]） - [[空海]]が[[高野山]]で真言宗総本山[[金剛峯寺]]の開創に着手 * [[文禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1592年]][[6月12日]]） - [[豊臣秀吉]]の朝鮮出兵の一番隊、[[小西行長]]・[[加藤清正]]が漢城（現在の[[ソウル特別市|ソウル]]）に入城 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[6月22日]]） - [[戊辰戦争]]で奥羽の反官軍33藩による[[奥羽越列藩同盟]]が成立
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1824年]]5月30日） - [[大村益次郎]]、兵学者（+ [[1869年]]） * 文政12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[6月4日]]） - [[陣幕久五郎]]、12代[[横綱]]（+ [[1903年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建保]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1213年]][[5月24日]]） - [[和田義盛]]、[[武将]]・[[鎌倉幕府]]初代侍所別当（* [[1147年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[5月3日 (旧暦)]] to [[May 3 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839457]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 3|qq=May 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:819|819]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]]) – [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at [[:en:Mount Kōya|Kōyasan]], founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, [[:en:Kongōbu-ji|Kongōbu-ji]]. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – In the first Korean expedition led by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]], the vanguard forces including [[:en:Konishi Yukinaga|Konishi Yukinaga]] and [[:en:Katō Kiyomasa|Katō Kiyomasa]] entered Hanseong (present-day [[:en:Seoul|Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213]] [[:en:May 24|May 24]]) – [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]], a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1147|1147]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初三]][[zh:五月初三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839457]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 3|qq=May 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:819|819]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]]) – [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at [[:en:Mount Kōya|Kōyasan]], founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, [[:en:Kongōbu-ji|Kongōbu-ji]]. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – In the first Korean expedition led by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]], the vanguard forces including [[:en:Konishi Yukinaga|Konishi Yukinaga]] and [[:en:Katō Kiyomasa|Katō Kiyomasa]] entered Hanseong (present-day [[:en:Seoul|Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213]] [[:en:May 24|May 24]]) – [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]], a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1147|1147]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. == Events == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:819|819]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]]) – [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at [[:en:Mount Kōya|Kōyasan]], founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, [[:en:Kongōbu-ji|Kongōbu-ji]]. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – In the first Korean expedition led by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]], the vanguard forces including [[:en:Konishi Yukinaga|Konishi Yukinaga]] and [[:en:Katō Kiyomasa|Katō Kiyomasa]] entered Hanseong (present-day [[:en:Seoul|Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.

== Events == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:819|819]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]]) – [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at [[:en:Mount Kōya|Kōyasan]], founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, [[:en:Kongōbu-ji|Kongōbu-ji]]. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – In the first Korean expedition led by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]], the vanguard forces including [[:en:Konishi Yukinaga|Konishi Yukinaga]] and [[:en:Katō Kiyomasa|Katō Kiyomasa]] entered Hanseong (present-day [[:en:Seoul|Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213]] [[:en:May 24|May 24]]) – [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]], a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1147|1147]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初三]][[zh:五月初三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839457]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 3|qq=May 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:819|819]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]]) – [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at [[:en:Mount Kōya|Kōyasan]], founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, [[:en:Kongōbu-ji|Kongōbu-ji]]. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – In the first Korean expedition led by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]], the vanguard forces including [[:en:Konishi Yukinaga|Konishi Yukinaga]] and [[:en:Katō Kiyomasa|Katō Kiyomasa]] entered Hanseong (present-day [[:en:Seoul|Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213]] [[:en:May 24|May 24]]) – [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]], a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1147|1147]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. == Events == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:819|819]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]]) – [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at [[:en:Mount Kōya|Kōyasan]], founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, [[:en:Kongōbu-ji|Kongōbu-ji]]. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – In the first Korean expedition led by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]], the vanguard forces including [[:en:Konishi Yukinaga|Konishi Yukinaga]] and [[:en:Katō Kiyomasa|Katō Kiyomasa]] entered Hanseong (present-day [[:en:Seoul|Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213]] [[:en:May 24|May 24]]) – [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]], a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1147|1147]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:819|819]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]]) – [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at [[:en:Mount Kōya|Kōyasan]], founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, [[:en:Kongōbu-ji|Kongōbu-ji]]. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – In the first Korean expedition led by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]], the vanguard forces including [[:en:Konishi Yukinaga|Konishi Yukinaga]] and [[:en:Katō Kiyomasa|Katō Kiyomasa]] entered Hanseong (present-day [[:en:Seoul|Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213]] [[:en:May 24|May 24]]) – [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]], a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1147|1147]]).

== Events == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:819|819]] [[:en:May 30|May 30]]) – [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at [[:en:Mount Kōya|Kōyasan]], founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, [[:en:Kongōbu-ji|Kongōbu-ji]]. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1592|1592]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – In the first Korean expedition led by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]], the vanguard forces including [[:en:Konishi Yukinaga|Konishi Yukinaga]] and [[:en:Katō Kiyomasa|Katō Kiyomasa]] entered Hanseong (present-day [[:en:Seoul|Seoul]]); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1340|1340]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Motouji|Ashikaga Mototada]], the second son of [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]], and the first Kamakura Kubō (died [[:en:1367|1367]]). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1511|1511]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshiharu|Ashikaga Yoshiharu]], the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1550|1550]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – [[:en:Bizan Kawakami|Kawakami Bēzan]], a novelist (died [[:en:1908|1908]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1213|1213]] [[:en:May 24|May 24]]) – [[:en:Wada Yoshimori|Wada Yoshimori]], a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1147|1147]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|弘仁|en|弘仁|WD=Q117599407|lt=弘仁}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|819|en|819|WD=Q30343|lt=819}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|WD=Q2590|lt=May 30}}) – {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai}} began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at {{ill|Mount Kōya|en|Mount Kōya|WD=Q535065|lt=Kōyasan}}, founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, {{ill|Kongōbu-ji|en|Kongōbu-ji|WD=Q1203429|lt=Kongōbu-ji}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12}}) – In the first Korean expedition led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}, the vanguard forces including {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|en|Konishi Yukinaga|WD=Q942553|lt=Konishi Yukinaga}} and {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|en|Katō Kiyomasa|WD=Q1069843|lt=Katō Kiyomasa}} entered Hanseong (present-day {{ill|Seoul|en|Seoul|WD=Q8684|lt=Seoul}}); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|WD=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō}} 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1340|en|1340|WD=Q6056|lt=1340}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Motouji|en|Ashikaga Motouji|WD=Q4306921|lt=Ashikaga Mototada}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died {{ill|1367|en|1367|WD=Q6202|lt=1367}}). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – {{ill|Bizan Kawakami|en|Bizan Kawakami|WD=Q529950|lt=Kawakami Bēzan}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|WD=Q1194251|lt=Kempo}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|WD=Q5261|lt=1213}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|WD=Q2584|lt=May 24}}) – {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|WD=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori}}, a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1147|en|1147|WD=Q19629|lt=1147}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|弘仁|en|弘仁|WD=Q117599407|lt=弘仁}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|819|en|819|WD=Q30343|lt=819}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|WD=Q2590|lt=May 30}}) – {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai}} began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at {{ill|Mount Kōya|en|Mount Kōya|WD=Q535065|lt=Kōyasan}}, founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, {{ill|Kongōbu-ji|en|Kongōbu-ji|WD=Q1203429|lt=Kongōbu-ji}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12}}) – In the first Korean expedition led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}, the vanguard forces including {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|en|Konishi Yukinaga|WD=Q942553|lt=Konishi Yukinaga}} and {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|en|Katō Kiyomasa|WD=Q1069843|lt=Katō Kiyomasa}} entered Hanseong (present-day {{ill|Seoul|en|Seoul|WD=Q8684|lt=Seoul}}); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|WD=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō}} 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1340|en|1340|WD=Q6056|lt=1340}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Motouji|en|Ashikaga Motouji|WD=Q4306921|lt=Ashikaga Mototada}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died {{ill|1367|en|1367|WD=Q6202|lt=1367}}). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – {{ill|Bizan Kawakami|en|Bizan Kawakami|WD=Q529950|lt=Kawakami Bēzan}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|WD=Q1194251|lt=Kempo}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|WD=Q5261|lt=1213}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|WD=Q2584|lt=May 24}}) – {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|WD=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori}}, a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1147|en|1147|WD=Q19629|lt=1147}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初三]][[zh:五月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初三]][[zh:五月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初三]][[zh:五月初三]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 3|qq=May 3}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|弘仁|en|弘仁|WD=Q117599407|lt=弘仁|1=弘仁}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|819|en|819|WD=Q30343|lt=819|1=819}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|WD=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}}) – {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai|1=Kūkai}} began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at {{ill|Mount Kōya|en|Mount Kōya|WD=Q535065|lt=Kōyasan|1=Mount Kōya}}, founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, {{ill|Kongōbu-ji|en|Kongōbu-ji|WD=Q1203429|lt=Kongōbu-ji|1=Kongōbu-ji}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku|1=Bunroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}}) – In the first Korean expedition led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}, the vanguard forces including {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|en|Konishi Yukinaga|WD=Q942553|lt=Konishi Yukinaga|1=Konishi Yukinaga}} and {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|en|Katō Kiyomasa|WD=Q1069843|lt=Katō Kiyomasa|1=Katō Kiyomasa}} entered Hanseong (present-day {{ill|Seoul|en|Seoul|WD=Q8684|lt=Seoul|1=Seoul}}); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.
== Births == * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|WD=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō|1=Ryakuō}} 3rd year / [[興国]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1340|en|1340|WD=Q6056|lt=1340|1=1340}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2|1=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Motouji|en|Ashikaga Motouji|WD=Q4306921|lt=Ashikaga Mototada|1=Ashikaga Motouji}}, the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}}, and the first Kamakura Kubō (died {{ill|1367|en|1367|WD=Q6202|lt=1367|1=1367}}). * [[:en:永正|永正]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|WD=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|WD=Q2511|lt=April 2|1=April 2}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|en|Ashikaga Yoshiharu|WD=Q536313|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiharu|1=Ashikaga Yoshiharu}}, the 12th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1550|en|1550|WD=Q6557|lt=1550|1=1550}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – {{ill|Bizan Kawakami|en|Bizan Kawakami|WD=Q529950|lt=Kawakami Bēzan|1=Bizan Kawakami}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|WD=Q2056|lt=1908|1=1908}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|WD=Q1194251|lt=Kempo|1=Kempo (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|WD=Q5261|lt=1213|1=1213}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|WD=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}}) – {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|WD=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori|1=Wada Yoshimori}}, a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1147|en|1147|WD=Q19629|lt=1147|1=1147}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|2|5|4|4|3|6|5|0503|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|弘仁|en|弘仁|WD=Q117599407|lt=弘仁|1=弘仁}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|819|en|819|WD=Q30343|lt=819|1=819}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|WD=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}}) – {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|WD=Q222227|lt=Kūkai|1=Kūkai}} began the establishment of the head temple of Shingon Buddhism at {{ill|Mount Kōya|en|Mount Kōya|WD=Q535065|lt=Kōyasan|1=Mount Kōya}}, founding the headquarters of the Shingon sect, {{ill|Kongōbu-ji|en|Kongōbu-ji|WD=Q1203429|lt=Kongōbu-ji|1=Kongōbu-ji}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku|1=Bunroku}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1592|en|1592|WD=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}}) – In the first Korean expedition led by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}, the vanguard forces including {{ill|Konishi Yukinaga|en|Konishi Yukinaga|WD=Q942553|lt=Konishi Yukinaga|1=Konishi Yukinaga}} and {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|en|Katō Kiyomasa|WD=Q1069843|lt=Katō Kiyomasa|1=Katō Kiyomasa}} entered Hanseong (present-day {{ill|Seoul|en|Seoul|WD=Q8684|lt=Seoul|1=Seoul}}); * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – The formation of the Ōu Reppan Dōmei (the alliance of 33 domains from northern Japan) during the Boshin War, uniting anti-bakufu forces in the region.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|WD=Q1194251|lt=Kempo|1=Kempo (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1213|en|1213|WD=Q5261|lt=1213|1=1213}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|WD=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}}) – {{ill|Wada Yoshimori|en|Wada Yoshimori|WD=Q3564968|lt=Wada Yoshimori|1=Wada Yoshimori}}, a military commander and the first Shitashō-bettō of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1147|en|1147|WD=Q19629|lt=1147|1=1147}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
